code: /** Optimization scoreboard display helpers. */export const SCOREBOARD_LIMIT=200;const TIER_LABELS={tier1_safe:'Tier 1 — Safe',tier2_balanced:'Tier 2 — Balanced',tier3_risky:'Tier 3 — Risky',blocked:'Blocked'};const TIER_TONES={tier1_safe:'safe',tier2_balanced:'balanced',tier3_risky:'risky',blocked:'blocked'};const DIMENSION_LABELS={cost:'Cost',safety:'Safety',effort:'Effort',workload:'Workload',business:'Business'};export function tierLabel(tier){if(!tier)return'—';return TIER_LABELS[tier]||tier.replace(/_/g,' ');}export function tierTone(tier){return TIER_TONES[tier]||'muted';}export function dimensionLabel(key){return DIMENSION_LABELS[key]||key;}export function formatScore(value){if(value==null||Number.isNaN(Number(value)))return'—';return Math.round(Number(value));}export function uniqueTiers(){let items=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:[];return[...new Set(items.map(i=>i.recommendation_tier).filter(Boolean))].sort();}
